title: Wano Celebrates Liberation
description: On pages 2–4, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Wano Citizens, Hiyori, Unknown person #2, Orochi, Unknown person #3 as Wano celebrates liberation while Momonosuke becomes shogun, Green Bull threatens the island, and the alliance prepares to depart.
scene: Wano celebrates liberation while Momonosuke becomes shogun, Green Bull threatens the island, and the alliance prepares to depart.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Wait! There is no need to flee!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What?

dialogue.speaker: Wano Citizens
dialogue.text: Mysterious figures in the flower capital...?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It seems that the Dragon really wasn't Kaido!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Really? So there are TWO dragons?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Something is happening in front of the castle?!

dialogue.speaker: Hiyori
dialogue.text: How can Komurasaki- Sama be here?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Boss Kyoshiro! What in the world is going on?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You two sure have made a name for yourselves...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Now, I wonder whether the rest of us...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ...Will still be recognizable to them?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: KI-!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Ki-!! Kin'Emon- Dono?!

dialogue.speaker: Orochi
dialogue.text: But how?! I thought he burned...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: ...with open castle that day....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: But he's in front of our eyes!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Is this a dream?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Have we passed on to the next life?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: But I don't remember US dying!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: It doesn't matter...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: ...If this is reality or a fantasy...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Either way, I think we're about to see something monumental!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Quick, fetch a light- scroll snail!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We have to get the word out to the rest of wano!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Hurry!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: No doubt about it!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: It's the Red Scab- Bards!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: They've been assumed dead for 20 years...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Toki-Sama's prophecy came true!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Seems something is happening in the capital...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Is this about the earth- quake?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I thought the village would shake apart!

summary: This part advances the Wano Aftermath through 32 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
